name: LLM Agent Chat
description: LLM-backed transition function for agents. Maintains conversation history and LLM configuration in agent state (state.config for provider/model/systemPrompt, state.history for conversation). The API key is resolved from the user's secret store using the name declared in operation metadata. Processes all inbox messages as user turns and generates an assistant response.

state.description: Previous conversation state (null on first run). Contains 'config' map (provider, model, systemPrompt, url) and 'history' array of role/content pairs.

messages.description: Inbox messages to process as user turns

apiKey.description: Optional API key override for testing. WARNING: will appear in plaintext in job results.

state.description: Updated conversation state with appended history

result.description: Contains 'response' with the assistant's reply text
